args.query: WITH t AS (SELECT "Index", try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS d1, try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') AS d2, try_strptime("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS d3 FROM index_trade) SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM (SELECT it."Index", it."Open", it."Close", COALESCE(d1,d2,d3) AS d FROM index_trade it JOIN t USING("Index") ) WHERE d IS NOT NULL AND strftime(d, '%Y')='2018' AND "Index" IN ('NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: WITH t AS (SELECT "Index", try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS d1, try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') AS d2, try_strptime("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS d3 FROM index_trade) SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM (SELECT it."Index", it."Open", it."Close", COALESCE(d1,d2,d3) AS d FROM index_trade it JOIN t USING("Index") ) WHERE d IS NOT NULL AND strftime(d, '%Y')='2018' AND "Index" IN ('NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

args.query: WITH parsed AS (SELECT "Index", COALESCE(try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p')) AS d, "Open", "Close" FROM index_trade) SELECT "Index", COUNT(*) AS days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM parsed WHERE d IS NOT NULL AND strftime(d,'%Y')='2018' AND "Index" IN ('NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

import json, pandas as pd
rows = var_call_iBo5pm1kP0oVioANeGurGlji
# more up than down
winners = [r['Index'] for r in rows if float(r['up_days']) > float(r['down_days'])]
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({'indices_more_up_than_down_2018': winners, 'detail': rows}))
